task_definitions.tuple_identification: Given an event and candidate evidence records, identify all gold SOA tuples.
task_definitions.evidence_support_classification: Given an event, a tuple claim, and one evidence record, classify evidence support.
task_definitions.chain_construction: Given an event and candidate evidence records, construct gold event chains.

notes: Tuple identification and chain construction are event-level tasks.
Evidence support classification contains gold positive tuple-evidence pairs and optional same-event negative samples.
Source files are not modified by this script.
